nasb.text: By faith Moses, when he had grown up, refused to be called the son of Pharaoh’s daughter,

esv.text: By faith Moses, when he was grown up, refused to be called the son of Pharaoh’s daughter,

cnv.text: 因著信，摩西長大了以後，就拒絕被稱為法老女兒的兒子。

ccb.text: 摩西长大成人后，凭信心拒绝做法老之女的儿子，

csbs.text: 因着信，摩西长大以后，拒绝被称为法老女儿的儿子。
